name: Archer Jin
dialogue: You move quiet — I’ll give you that.
But quiet doesn’t mean ready. The brambles are full of things that bite.
Let’s see if your team can keep up.
preBattleLine: Jin nocks a phantom arrow — his team springs from the canopy!
postDefeatDialogue: You’ve heard about the Five Pillars Dojo? Five masters, five elements, one throne.
Nobody from this forest has beaten them yet. Maybe you’re different.
Ren is up the ridge. She’ll test more than your reflexes.
